1377.code: while (getnow() == AND || getnow() == LPARENT || getnow() == IDENFR || getnow() == INTCON || getnow() == CHRCON || getnow() == PLUS || getnow() == MINU || getnow() == NOT)
1377.reason: [The while loop condition incorrectly includes tokens that can start an expression. According to the grammar, LAndExp should only loop when the next token is '&&' (AND). Including other tokens causes the parser to incorrectly consume subsequent expressions without the logical operator, violating the grammar and leading to parsing errors.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  The while loop condition incorrectly includes all first-set tokens of EqExp, causing it to loop infinitely or incorrectly when the next token is not '&&'. According to the grammar, the loop should only continue when the next token is '&&'.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  The while loop condition incorrectly includes non-operator tokens (LPARENT, IDENFR, etc.), causing it to continue looping and call EqExp even when the next token is not '&&', which violates the grammar rule LAndExp → LAndExp '&&' EqExp.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The while loop condition incorrectly includes tokens that can start an expression. According to the grammar, LAndExp should only loop when the next token is '&&' (AND). Including other tokens causes the parser to incorrectly consume subsequent expressions without the logical operator, violating the grammar and leading to parsing errors.]

1382.reason: When the next token is not '&&', it adds a null node and calls EqExp again, which is incorrect. The loop should only proceed when '&&' is present.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  When the next token is not '&&', it adds a null node and calls EqExp again, which is incorrect. The loop should only proceed when '&&' is present.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  When the next token is not '&&', it adds a null node and still calls EqExp, which is incorrect. The loop should only continue when the next token is '&&'.
